tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj zdania. Wykorzystując wyrazy podane wielkimi literami, uzupełnij każde zdanie z luką tak, aby precyzyjnie oddać sens zdania wyjściowego. Nie zmieniaj formy podanych wyrazów. W każdą lukę możesz wpisać maksymalnie pięć wyrazów, wliczając w to wyraz już podany.

items.original: I'm sorry I didn't study harder before the exam.
She didn't bring an umbrella, so she got wet.
items.transformed: She would not (wouldn't) have got wet _________ an umbrella.

items.original: It's a pity we can't fly to the school trip destination.
items.transformed: If _________ to the school trip destination!

items.original: He doesn't exercise regularly, so he feels tired all the time.
items.transformed: If he _________ regularly, he would not (wouldn't) feel tired all the time.

items.original: I really want my parents to let me stay up late.
items.transformed: I _________ let me stay up late.

items.original: Unless you leave now, you will miss the bus.
items.transformed: You will miss the bus _________ now.
